_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the 'specified Python path is not valid' branch of the python-activities playbook. Python Scope fails at open because its Path property is set to C:\Program Files\Python311\python.exe (the executable) instead of the install folder C:\Program Files\Python311. The error names the exact bad Path; the decisive evidence is the trailing \python.exe in process/Main.xaml's Python Scope Path. Expected chain: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get -> jobs logs -> read process/Main.xaml Python Scope config.
